requirement_topic.zh: EMC——电动自行车电磁兼容性（指令2014/30/EU + EN 15194）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——電動自行車電磁相容性（指令2014/30/EU + EN 15194）

summary.en: EU e-bikes (EPACs ≤250W/25km/h) must comply with the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU as well as the EMC clause within EN 15194:2017 (Clause 4.9). EN 15194:2017 Annex C specifies EMC test requirements for the complete EPAC, referencing CISPR 14-1 (conducted and radiated emissions from household and similar products) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity). The motor drive system (controller + motor) generates switching noise that must be measured and constrained to CISPR 14-1 limits. A self-declaration route under EMC Directive is available for EPACs if the manufacturer applies the harmonised standard (EN 15194 Annex C / CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2).
summary.zh: 欧盟电动自行车（EPAC ≤250W/25km/h）须同时符合EMC指令2014/30/EU及EN 15194:2017第4.9条的EMC条款。EN 15194:2017附件C规定了整车EPAC的EMC测试要求，参照CISPR 14-1（家用及类似产品的传导和辐射骚扰）及CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。电机驱动系统（控制器+电机）产生的开关噪声须经测量并符合CISPR 14-1限值。若制造商采用协调标准（EN 15194附件C / CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2），可采用自我声明路径满足EMC指令要求。
summary.zht: 歐盟電動自行車（EPAC ≤250W/25km/h）須同時符合EMC指令2014/30/EU及EN 15194:2017第4.9條的EMC條款。EN 15194:2017附件C規定了整車EPAC的EMC測試要求，參照CISPR 14-1（家用及類似產品的傳導和輻射騷擾）及CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。電機驅動系統（控制器+電機）產生的開關噪聲須經測量並符合CISPR 14-1限值。若製造商採用協調標準（EN 15194附件C / CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2），可採用自我聲明路徑滿足EMC指令要求。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 Annex C — EMC test requirements for EPAC
CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
CISPR 14-2 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 2: Immunity

gap.en: A full EMC test on the complete e-bike system (motor + controller + battery + wiring harness) per EN 15194:2017 Annex C / CISPR 14-1 emission and CISPR 14-2 immunity is required at an EU-recognised EMC test facility. Key gaps: (a) Chinese GB 17761-2018 compliance may not include full system EMC; (b) CISPR 14-1 Class B limits (residential environments) apply — the motor drive switching frequency and harmonics must be below these limits; (c) a separate EU Declaration of Conformity citing the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU must be issued; (d) the Technical File must contain EMC test reports, test configuration photos, and the EMC assessment.
gap.zh: 须在欧盟认可的EMC测试机构，按EN 15194:2017附件C / CISPR 14-1骚扰和CISPR 14-2抗扰度要求，对整车电动自行车系统（电机+控制器+电池+线束）进行完整EMC测试。主要差距包括：（a）中国GB 17761-2018合规测试可能未包含完整的整车EMC测试；（b）须满足CISPR 14-1 B类限值（住宅环境）——电机驱动开关频率及谐波须低于该限值；（c）须单独签发引用EMC指令2014/30/EU的欧盟符合性声明；（d）技术文件须包含EMC测试报告、测试配置照片及EMC评估。
gap.zht: 須在歐盟認可的EMC測試機構，按EN 15194:2017附件C / CISPR 14-1騷擾和CISPR 14-2抗擾度要求，對整車電動自行車系統（電機+控制器+電池+線束）進行完整EMC測試。主要差距包括：（a）中國GB 17761-2018合規測試可能未包含完整的整車EMC測試；（b）須滿足CISPR 14-1 B類限值（住宅環境）——電機驅動開關頻率及諧波須低於該限值；（c）須單獨簽發引用EMC指令2014/30/EU的歐盟符合性聲明；（d）技術文件須包含EMC測試報告、測試配置照片及EMC評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU; EN 15194:2017 Annex C applies as harmonised standard
mandatory_status.cn: conditional — GB 4343.1 / GB/T 4343.2 apply to motor-driven products; not always separately enforced under GB 17761-2018 compliance

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 does not include a comprehensive standalone EMC clause for the complete e-bike system. EMC requirements for Chinese e-bikes may be addressed through GB 4343.1 (household electrical appliances EMC — emission) and GB/T 4343.2 (immunity), which are the CN counterparts to CISPR 14-1/14-2. However, GB 17761-2018 compliance testing does not necessarily include full CISPR 14-1 emission measurements on the complete vehicle. Chinese e-bike exports typically lack an EMC test report for the complete EPAC system as required by the EU EMC Directive.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018对整车电动自行车系统未包含完整的独立EMC条款。中国电动自行车的EMC要求可通过GB 4343.1（家用电器EMC——骚扰）及GB/T 4343.2（抗扰度）加以规范，其对应CISPR 14-1/14-2的中国标准。但GB 17761-2018合规测试不一定包含整车的CISPR 14-1完整辐射骚扰测量。中国电动自行车出口产品通常缺少欧盟EMC指令要求的整车EPAC系统EMC测试报告。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018對整車電動自行車系統未包含完整的獨立EMC條款。中國電動自行車的EMC要求可通過GB 4343.1（家用電器EMC——騷擾）及GB/T 4343.2（抗擾度）加以規範，其對應CISPR 14-1/14-2的中國標準。但GB 17761-2018合規測試不一定包含整車的CISPR 14-1完整輻射騷擾測量。中國電動自行車出口產品通常缺少歐盟EMC指令所要求的整車EPAC系統EMC測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Household electrical appliances — Emission (SAMR, corresponds to CISPR 14-1)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Household electrical appliances — Immunity (SAMR, corresponds to CISPR 14-2)
